files.desc: Master entryway, quick overview, and table of contents linking all sub-guides
System architecture, multi-process flows, request lifecycle sequence, native Rust tauri config, and developer guidelines
Coordinate scaling and resolution normalization: physical screens to downsampled screenshots and overlay browser CSS pixels
Target fuzzy-matching scoring matrix, bonuses, penalties, UIA-OCR coordinate merging, and step post-processors
Preflight request classifier, continuation logic, single-step prompts, Ollama local client, and cloud Groq client
Sarvam AI voice integration: text-to-speech payloads, speech-to-text multipart forms, audio elements, and React-Tauri settings hooks
Granular, per-file API contracts and function specs for Rust commands, React views, and Python modules
Tutor container with drag-resize, settings panel, dynamic height, no-polling reactive architecture
Fullscreen coordinate canvas placing pulsars on the single matched target; full-width bypass for input controls, icon/row highlight caps, and click dismissal
Tauri JS interfaces mapping React commands, previous_question, and tutor progress to Rust bindings

Python processing loop: preflight+continuation classifier, PID-locked capture, __BLINKY_CAPTURED__ marker, UIA coord normalisation, Blinky UI filtering, and 4-stage post-processing (attach_matches → skip_navigation → fill_search_targets → slice[:1])
Model router connecting prompt compilers to Ollama / Groq endpoints with provider label
Prompt builder: preflight with continuation detection, chat prompt, screen prompt with single-step enforcement, search-bar awareness, and exact target_text requirement for search inputs
Local Ollama inference with num_predict:350, temperature:0.1, retry logic, and 120s timeout
Cloud Groq Vision inference with max_tokens:350, configurable timeout, and decommissioned model fallback
OCR pipeline attempting native Windows WinRT OCR with EasyOCR fallbacks
Display capture engine (dxcam/ImageGrab); Screenshot dataclass with post-thumbnail and physical screen dimensions

Fuzzy matcher with exact match bonus (+0.30), input control preference (+0.30), sidebar context (+0.20), interactive bonuses, and Blinky penalty (-0.40). Includes semantic close/settings button handlers
UI Automation tree traverser; accepts target_pid for fresh COM element; returns screen-absolute coordinates without manual offset
Z-order window scanner with target_pid support and Blinky process exclusion
Rust native backend: system tray, shortcuts, global click hooks, WDA_EXCLUDEFROMCAPTURE capture exclusion, and __BLINKY_CAPTURED__ marker detection
Workspace setup script actions and dev tool definitions
Developer onboarding specs and standard local install instructions
